MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order To Show Cause will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney for failure to file the Inventory and Appraisal. The return date is October 7, 2008 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.
